requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Sri Lanka must have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 test evidence where transport rules require it. Sri Lanka as an island nation receives almost all BESS imports by sea. Exporters should prepare a UN 38.3 test summary, safety data sheet (SDS), dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, and IMDG Code sea-transport documentation before shipment. Air transport of large BESS lithium batteries is severely restricted under IATA DGR.
summary.zh: 运往斯里兰卡的锂电芯和电池在运输规则要求时须具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节测试证据。斯里兰卡作为岛国，几乎所有BESS均通过海运进口。出口商应在出货前准备UN 38.3测试概要、安全数据表（SDS）、危险货物分类、包装证据和IMDG规则海运运输文件。大型BESS锂电池空运受IATA DGR严格限制。
summary.zht: 運往斯里蘭卡的鋰電芯和電池在運輸規則要求時須具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節測試證據。斯里蘭卡作為島國，幾乎所有BESS均通過海運進口。出口商應在出貨前準備UN 38.3測試概要、安全數據表（SDS）、危險貨物分類、包裝證據和IMDG規則海運運輸文件。大型BESS鋰電池空運受IATA DGR嚴格限制。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code for sea transport of dangerous goods
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport (large battery restrictions apply)

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, transport conditions appraisal reports, and dangerous-goods packaging documents for lithium battery shipments. These documents are required but must match the exact shipped cell or battery configuration — a cell-level UN 38.3 report does not automatically cover a battery module, rack, or containerised system shipped to Sri Lanka.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常为锂电池货运准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输条件鉴定书和危险货物包装文件。这些文件是必要的，但必须与实际出货的电芯或电池配置一致——电芯级UN 38.3报告不能自动覆盖运往斯里兰卡的电池模组、电池架或集装箱系统。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常為鋰電池貨運準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、運輸條件鑑定書和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件是必要的，但必須與實際出貨的電芯或電池配置一致——電芯級UN 38.3報告不能自動覆蓋運往斯里蘭卡的電池模組、電池架或集裝箱系統。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary
Dangerous-goods packaging and transport documents for BESS

gap.en: UN 38.3 transport evidence is configuration-specific. A test summary covering a cell may not cover a module, rack, or containerised BESS. Sri Lanka importers, port authorities, shipping agents, and carriers may reject inconsistent test summaries, SDS classifications, package marks, or shipping names. Exporters should ensure the UN 38.3 test summary covers the exact BESS configuration shipped, and prepare a complete dangerous-goods package for Colombo port authorities.
gap.zh: UN 38.3运输证据与配置强相关。覆盖电芯的测试概要未必覆盖模组、电池架或集装箱BESS。斯里兰卡进口商、港口当局、货运代理和承运人可能拒收测试概要、SDS分类、包装标识或运输品名不一致的货物。出口商应确保UN 38.3测试概要覆盖实际出货的BESS配置，并为科伦坡港口当局准备完整的危险货物文件包。
gap.zht: UN 38.3運輸證據與配置強相關。覆蓋電芯的測試概要未必覆蓋模組、電池架或集裝箱BESS。斯里蘭卡進口商、港口當局、貨運代理和承運人可能拒收測試概要、SDS分類、包裝標識或運輸品名不一致的貨物。出口商應確保UN 38.3測試概要覆蓋實際出貨的BESS配置，並為科倫坡港口當局準備完整的危險貨物文件包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery sea or air transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB battery safety evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport documentation. The shipped BESS configuration must be covered by the UN 38.3 test summary and IMDG-compliant dangerous-goods shipping documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB电池安全证据不能替代UN 38.3运输文件。实际出货的BESS配置必须被UN 38.3测试概要和符合IMDG规则的危险货物运输文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB電池安全證據不能替代UN 38.3運輸文件。實際出貨的BESS配置必須被UN 38.3測試概要和符合IMDG規則的危險貨物運輸文件覆蓋。
